title: Multi-purpose module or container or block prepared from mixed waste plastic, plastic type resins and related polymer
abstract: A multi-purpose module /container/ block comprising the hollow module /container/ block of mixed waste plastic, plastic type resins and related polymer filled with filling material such as road paving mixture or concrete or bitumen or asphalt or similar material.
claims:
Claims WE CLAIM : 1. A multi-purpose module /container/ block comprising the hollow module /container/ block of mixed waste plastic, plastic type resins and related polymer filled with filling material such as road paving mixture or concrete or bitumen or asphalt or similar material. 2. The multi-purpose module as claimed in claim 1, wherein said hollow module is open from one side and is optionally sealed with cover once filled with the filling material. 3. The multi-purpose module as claimed in claim 1, wherein said module comprises mixture of all types of plastic under category 1 to 7 and the composition ratio of categories may vary from 0 to 100%. 4. The multi-purpose module as claimed in claim 1, wherein said module is tailored and manufactured in varying dimensions and all geometrically possible shapes with volume up to 100 m 3 . 5. The multi-purpose module as claimed in claim 1, wherein the weight of filling material, concrete or bituminous or asphalt or any suitable material used in road construction, is up to 1000 kg per module/block. 6. The multi-purpose module as claimed in claim 1, wherein said filling material comprises bitumen, crushed stone of different particle size, other asphalt material, sulphur, sludge, soil, lime stone or binders, etc. 7. The method for preparing module /container/ block from waste plastic, plastic type resins and related polymer comprising: - segregation of the waste plastic, plastic type resins and related polymer from non- plastic/polymer waste; - shredding the said waste plastic, plastic type resins and related polymer and converting into a uniform slurry or semi liquid; pressing or moulding the particles under pressure and heat to form a module or sheet for making a hollow module of pre-determined shape and size; 

 - optionally applying pre-determined heat and pressure to obtain sheet/block/container/module with homogenous consistency; - filling said hollow block/container/module with road paving mixture or concrete or bitumen or asphalt or similar material; and - optionally sealing the said block/container/module to form a solid block/container/module. 8. The method as claimed in claim 8, wherein all types of waste plastic are mixed together under pressure and heat till it form and predetermined shape and size. 9. A method as claimed in claim 8, wherein the waste plastic comprises domestic plastic waste, industrial waste plastic material, polymers or polymer type material content, municipal solid plastic waste, scrap plastic materials, or waste plastic originated from any source, etc. 10. A method as claimed in claim 8, wherein the said method requires no or minimal washing of the plastic. 11. A method as claimed in claim 8, wherein the said method is a continuous process of melting and moulding module. 12. A method as claimed in claim 8, wherein optionally suitable additive may be added to the shredded mixture to provide strength. 13. A method as claimed in claim 8, wherein optionally said modules are made from a mould type method. 14. A method as claimed in claim 8, wherein sealing of the block/container/module is optional and is done with the same material or paving mixture or concrete or bitumen or asphalt or similar material. 15. The multi-purpose module as claimed in claim 1, wherein said block is used in laying under road basement, embankment structure, footpaths, as one of the supporting layer. 16. The multi-purpose module from waste plastic, plastic type resins and related polymer as claimed in claim 1, wherein said block act as water resistant medium for road base and protect the road base material and enhance the road life. 17. The multi-purpose module from waste plastic, plastic type resins and related polymer as claimed in claim 1, wherein said block are arranged in the form of tower having individual units connected one over above. 18. The multi-purpose module from waste plastic is laid empty and the filled with the paving mixture or concrete or bitumen or asphalt or similar material for construction of road. 19. The multi-purpose module from waste plastic as and when connected to each other and used for road construction.
